title: dryopteris pilosiuscula
intro: Dryopteris pilosiuscula, also known as the hairy buckler fern, is a species of fern native to the mountains of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris pilosiuscula include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
